flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Contra Costa College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Contra Costa College rose 203% between 2007 and 2010 (2.3k → 6.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Contra Costa College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Contra Costa College rose 44% between 2007 and 2010 (18.0% → 26.0%).
